compressed_prompt: write song lyrics on socio-economic issue; english, all lowercase; no commas
response:
in the city where the dreams are made of gold
the streets are paved with stories yet untold
but beneath the glitter and the neon lights
lies a world where shadows hide from sight

the rich they live in mansions high above
while down below the poor just try to love
a system built on greed and endless strife
where the have-nots struggle just to survive

we sing of freedom and equality
but the truth is hidden in inequality
the gap between the haves and have-nots wide
a socio-economic divide

the children born into a world of strife
where opportunity is just a distant life
they dream of breaking free from chains so tight
but the system keeps them in its endless night

the workers toil from dawn till dusk each day
for a wage that barely keeps them at bay
they yearn for justice and a fair reward
but the powers that be turn a deaf ear

the politicians promise change and hope
but their actions often leave us on a rope
they speak of progress yet the poor remain
trapped in a cycle of never-ending pain

but we won't be silent we will raise our voice
for a world where everyone has a choice
where the wealth is shared and opportunities grow
and the socio-economic divide starts to slow

we'll stand together in the face of strife
and fight for justice for a better life
we'll sing this song of change and unity
for a world where all can find their destiny
